sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root סוּר), prop. a departing, withdrawing; hence-

(1) the violation of a law, an offence, Deu 19:16.

(2) departure from Jehovah, Deu 13:6 Jer 28:16 29:32 Isa 1:5 31:6 59:13 .

(3) cessation, Isa 14:6. Others derive the first and second significations from the root סָרַר to be stubborn; but for this there is no need.
